generation_contract.positive_template: Transform the uniform clay pose guide into one {size} {life_stage} {breed} {species} with a {body_build} anatomically normal body, coherent {coat_color} {coat_length} fur with a {coat_pattern} pattern, {ear_shape} ears, and a {tail_shape} tail.
generation_contract.pose_guard_prompt: The input is an untextured uniform-clay pose guide, not an appearance reference. Replace every visible clay surface, including the neck, torso, near-side limbs, far-side limbs, paws, head, ears, and tail, with one coherent photorealistic breed-appropriate coat. Preserve the exact authored neutral rigging stance, silhouette, and joint locations from the input. Use the input's orthographic exact side view with the camera level at torso height. The torso and spine must remain one straight horizontal longitudinal axis with zero yaw toward the camera. The head and neck must align with that axis; the animal must not look toward or away from the camera and must not tilt its head. Preserve all four individually visible legs: only the far-side front and hind limb chains have small deterministic opposite fore-aft offsets, while the torso and near-side limbs remain in the authored rest pose. Do not convert these compact offsets into a walking stride or show-dog stack. Keep all four paws planted on the same level ground plane. Keep the tail separated from the body, preserve full-body framing, and use a plain background. This is a static rigging reference, not an action pose.
generation_contract.negative_prompt: three-quarter view, perspective view, camera yaw, torso yaw, twisted torso, twisted spine, curved body axis, head turned toward camera, head turned away from camera, tilted head, walking, running, gait stride, lifted paw, crouching, sitting, lying down, uneven ground, mismatched paw height, crossed legs, splayed legs, cropped body, sitting, lying down, merged legs, hidden paws, fused tail, extra limbs, gray clay patch, untextured patch, plastic patch, collar, scarf, accessory, background geometry, text

reference_provenance.notes: Provisional pipeline target only; replace with a license-snapshotted breed reference and measured canary before formal registration.

coat_color.label: coat color
coat_color.comparison_question: Which golden retriever has the darker coat?

body_build.label: body build
body_build.comparison_question: Which golden retriever has the stockier build?
